description_long: This is a rectangular, pillow-shaped package of plain tea biscuits, predominantly white with a soft yellow gradient and subtle wheat graphics. The front features the product name 'Plain Tea Biscuits' in large red and yellow text, accompanied by an image of a biscuit and a transparent cup of tea, suggesting the intended pairing. The sides are tightly sealed and have a serrated edge, typical of snack packaging. The back displays a barcode, nutritional information, and additional product details in small print. The overall appearance is clean and inviting, with a focus on simplicity and clarity. The packaging is likely made of a flexible plastic or metallized film, designed to keep the biscuits fresh.
description: A white, pillow-shaped package of plain tea biscuits with red and yellow text, wheat graphics, and a tea cup image. The back shows nutritional information and a barcode.
description_view_0: Front view showing the product name, biscuit and tea cup images, and wheat graphics on a white and yellow background.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin, sealed edge of the package with serrated sides and minimal visible graphics.
description_view_2: Back view displaying nutritional information, barcode, and product details in small print on a white background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thin, sealed edge with serrated sides.
attribute_flavor_indication: The text 'Plain' and the image of a biscuit with a cup of tea indicate a plain, tea biscuit flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and a barcode are visible on the back of the package.
